summary: First iteration end-to-end testing of J.M.A. Motor Service landing page. Backend (FastAPI + MongoDB) — 10/10 pytest cases passing: health, CORS preflight, service-request CREATE (min + full payload), validation (missing fields, invalid email, short name), and LIST endpoint (sort + no _id leakage). RESEND_API_KEY is empty as expected — backend gracefully returns email_sent=false and persists requests. Frontend — all major sections render correctly: hero with 3 CTAs + 4 trust badges, 9 service cards, 6 why-us points, 5.0/8 reviews card with Google Maps link, contact section with address/plus-code/map/WhatsApp, FAQ accordion with single-open behavior (grid-rows-[0fr] collapse), responsive mobile (390px, 0 horizontal overflow), mobile menu toggle + 5 mobile nav links + mobile call CTA, sticky header nav scroll, all tel: hrefs pointing to +353852246411, WhatsApp wa.me/353852246411, floating action buttons (opacity-fade after scrollY>700), Service Request Form happy-path (POST succeeds, success message contains 'We will contact you to confirm availability'), validation errors for required fields and invalid email. No console errors. Title correct ('J.M.A. Motor Service | Car Repair & Maintenance in Dublin').
action_items: Optional / minor: spec listed expected error testids as 'form-field-car_make_model-error' and 'form-field-service_needed-error', but the implementation uses shortened ids 'form-field-car-error' and 'form-field-service-error' (testid base for the labels is 'form-field-car' / 'form-field-service', and inputs are 'form-input-car' / 'form-input-service'). All errors render correctly visually; only naming differs from the original spec. If strict spec compliance is required, rename testids in /app/frontend/src/components/ServiceRequestForm.jsx (lines 190, 199, 206, 214 area) to use full field names. Otherwise no action needed.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated @app.on_event('shutdown') — FastAPI recommends lifespan handlers; functional but a future deprecation.
GET /api/service-requests has no auth — note in code says 'intended for owner use' but it is publicly accessible. Acceptable for MVP; consider basic auth/API key before exposing real customer data.
Form testid naming inconsistency between spec and implementation (form-field-car vs form-field-car_make_model). Minor; works either way.
seed_data_creation: Test created multiple TEST_* prefixed documents in MongoDB collection 'service_requests' via the public POST endpoint. They are visible in GET /api/service-requests. Owner may purge if desired.
context_for_next_testing_agent:
Backend is solid. RESEND_API_KEY is intentionally empty (email_configured=false, email_sent=false). The single-open FAQ behavior uses CSS grid-rows-[0fr]+overflow-hidden — Playwright .is_visible() on the

can return True even when collapsed; verify via parent .grid offsetHeight instead. Floating actions wrapper is always in DOM (opacity transitions on scrollY>700). Form error testids are 'form-field-car-error' / 'form-field-service-error' (not _make_model / _needed).
rca of the issue: No critical issues — all flows working as designed.
